ItacPersonItem.PersonalTitle: Bishop of Padua|Bishop of Verona|Bishop of Brescia|Cardinal
ItacPersonItem.Notes: Protector of the Ricovrati in 1723. Venetian ambassador at the French court.
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
